overall.description: A space simulation showing a volcanic planet with glowing magma cracks orbiting through deep space. The camera orbits the planet as it gradually enters the shadow of a massive red gas giant, transitioning from full illumination to a thin crescent. A space station complex remains visible to the left throughout the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space orbit around volcanic planet

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft in stable orbit around the volcanic planet, approaching from the dayside

entered.detail: large spherical planet with glowing orange magma cracks across the surface
cluster of space structures and ships positioned to the left of the planet
diffuse brownish gas clouds surrounding the planetary system

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a fully illuminated volcanic planet dominating the center of the frame, its surface cracked with glowing orange lava flows. A space station complex floats in the distance to the left, while the camera maintains a steady orbital trajectory through the starfield.

events.description: shadow begins creeping across the right edge of the planet as it enters eclipse
massive red gas giant becomes visible on the left horizon, partially obscuring the space station

agents.ego_description: continuing orbital trajectory as the planet enters shadow, revealing the gas giant

entered.detail: massive red-orange gas giant planet entering the frame from the left

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its orbit, the volcanic planet begins entering a deep shadow, with the terminator line sweeping across its cracked surface. A massive red gas giant dramatically enters the frame from the left, dwarfing the space station which becomes obscured behind it.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep eclipse shadow near gas giant

events.description: planet is now almost completely in shadow with only a thin silver crescent illuminated

agents.ego_description: observing the total eclipse of the volcanic planet against the backdrop of the red gas giant

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the volcanic planet as a thin silver crescent against the darkness, with the red gas giant now dominating the left side of the frame. The camera continues its steady orbit through the nebula clouds, capturing the dramatic eclipse in the deep space environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital movement around a volcanic planet as it transitions from full illumination into a dramatic eclipse. It begins with the planet dominating the frame, its surface etched with glowing orange lava flows while a space station complex floats in the distance to the left. As the camera maintains its steady trajectory, a massive red gas giant enters from the left and dwarfs the space station, casting a deep shadow that sweeps across the volcanic terrain. The scene then shifts as the planet is reduced to a thin silver crescent against the darkness, with the gas giant now dominating the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera continues its orbit through drifting nebula clouds, capturing the stark contrast of the eclipsed world in the deep space environment.
